caption: A man with short grey hair, wearing a black suit, a light blue shirt, and a dark blue tie, speaks while seated in front of a beige wall. The wall features a repeating logo of a laurel wreath encircling a globe and the text "UNITED STATES INSTITUTE OF PEACE". The man is the sole person visible. He begins by gesturing with both hands open and wide to emphasize his point. He then transitions to pointing his right index finger forward toward the audience. After pointing, he is seen with his right hand raised near his shoulder and a slight smile on his face. Finally, he settles into a more neutral posture, looking forward with a serious expression. He wears a white identification badge clipped to his left suit pocket. An electrical outlet is visible on the wall to his left.
